scriptText:
[[STAGING]]
[[PRODUCTION]]
Video Model: Dreamina Seedance 2.0
Platform: Dreamina (dreamina.capcut.com)

Prod. 2026.04.24-26

Generation:
- INTRO: 1/1
- LEA: 1/1
- ROBERT: 1/11
- JOHN: 1/1
- SARAH: 1/1
- EVAN: 1/1
- ROSA: 1/2
- MARK: 1/1
Total Generation: 19
[[/PRODUCTION]]
[[/STAGING]]












I. INTRO

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a cinematic multiverse introductory teaser featuring @actor as Mark, a "Traveler" who anchors multiple realities through a shifting artifact, in a high-concept sci-fi anthology style.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Prioritize strict match-on-action continuity centered on the metallic sphere. Ensure the sphere’s trajectory and the character's hand placement remain spatially locked across cuts to ground the rapid environmental shifts. Maintain consistent eyeline toward the sphere to preserve the "anchor" logic.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Texture: High-contrast 35mm cinematic grain; varying shutter speeds per era.
Palette: Shifting from neon-cyan (Future) to sun-bleached amber (Wasteland) to monochrome (Noir).
Lighting: Dramatic chiaroscuro; the sphere acts as a primary light source with a shifting internal glow.
Wardrobe: Tactical tech-vest (Shot 1) -> Distressed linen wraps (Shot 2) -> Charcoal wool overcoat (Shot 3) -> Minimalist black bodysuit (Shot 4).
Prop: A "Chronos Sphere"—a palm-sized, shifting geometric orb with a liquid-metal surface.
Continuity State: Sphere always begins/ends relative to the right hand.
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
[CAM] MCU, centered, lockoff. Mark stands in a rain-misted neon alleyway, holding a pulsating metallic sphere in his open right palm. His face is half-shadowed by a flickering blue sign.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MCU -> [ACT] Mark looks down at the sphere and tosses it upward; as the ball leaves his hand, the rain freezes in mid-air -> [AUDIO/ENV] Heavy rain, neon buzz. MARK: "Every new world needs a wanderer."
[CAM] MS, match-cut on sphere trajectory -> [BLOCK] Environment snaps to a vast, windy desert at golden hour; Mark is now in desert robes -> [ACT] He tracks the sphere as it reaches its apex against a harsh sun -> [AUDIO/ENV] Sudden wind gust, sand grit. MARK (CONT'D): "A thousand horizons."
[CAM] MCU, match-cut on sphere descent -> [BLOCK] Environment shifts to a 1940s noir interior with heavy shadows; Mark wears a trench coat -> [ACT] The sphere falls into his right hand; he catches it with a slight recoil of the wrist -> [AUDIO/ENV] Distant jazz, ticking clock. MARK (CONT'D): "A million lives."
[CAM] CU, low-angle looking up -> [BLOCK] Environment shifts to a sterile, high-tech white void; Mark is in a sleek black turtleneck -> [ACT] He holds the sphere close to the lens; the orb’s surface begins to glow with an intense, blinding white light -> [AUDIO/VFX] Rising synth swell, high-frequency hum. MARK: "Let me introduce you ... to the faces of our multiverse."
[CAM] FS, center-framed -> [BLOCK] The white void expands -> [ACT] Mark stands perfectly still as the sphere in his hand erupts into a localized supernova, consuming his silhouette and the entire frame -> [TRANS] Fade to White -> [AUDIO/VFX] Heavy cinematic sub-bass thud, silence.
[</BRIEF>]

II. LEA

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a 10-second cinematic fantasy flight montage featuring @actor as LEA, an ethereal sky-dancer traversing celestial realms through gravity-defying choreography and seamless match-on-action transitions.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Prioritize vertical and rotational momentum. Use LEA’s center of gravity as the match-cut anchor. Ensure the "flying-dance" feels weightless yet deliberate, with transitions occurring during peak physical movements (leaps, spins, or dives). Maintain constant camera movement (tracking/orbiting) to simulate flight and preserve spatial continuity between different sky environments.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Medium: Digital IMAX, ethereal bloom, ultra-high frame rate for fluid motion
Palette: Pearlescent White/Gold -> Verdant Green/Teal -> Deep Nebula Purple/Indigo -> Burnished Copper/Crimson
Lighting: Multi-directional rim lighting, "Golden Hour" sky glow, bioluminescent star-trails
Wardrobe: Translucent, flowing silks that react to wind/flight; iridescent fabrics that shift color with the environment
Props: Glowing ribbons of light that trail from her fingertips
Environment: Kingdom of solid clouds, floating jungle archipelago, cosmic star-nursery, floating clockwork aerodrome
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
[CAM] MS, TRACKING UPWARD -> LEA is suspended in a vast expanse of golden clouds, her body angled 45 degrees, mid-pirouette; she wears flowing white silks that trail upward as if in zero-gravity.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MS, SPIRAL ORBIT -> [ACT] LEA performs a tight aerial spin, drawing a circle in the air with her glowing finger-ribbons -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Wind rushing, crystalline chimes, shimmering cloud-dust.
[CAM] MS, MATCH-CUT (Continuing the spin) -> [ACT] The rotation continues perfectly, but the background shifts to a lush floating jungle; LEA’s silks turn teal to match the vibrant vines she glides past -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Exotic bird calls, rushing waterfalls from floating islands.
[CAM] MCU, MATCH-CUT (Transition into a forward dive) -> [ACT] LEA archs her back and dives head-first through a layer of thick mist -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Low-frequency "whoosh," muffled soundscape.
[CAM] FS, MATCH-CUT (Exiting the dive) -> [ACT] She emerges from the mist into a cosmic void filled with purple nebulae, transitioning her dive into a graceful, swimming breaststroke through the stars -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Ethereal synth pads, sparkling star-twinkle SFX.
[CAM] MS, MATCH-CUT (Momentum shift) -> [ACT] She kicks off an invisible surface and propels herself upward into a steampunk sky-city; her wardrobe shifts to copper-trimmed leather as she soars between giant spinning brass propellers -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Heavy mechanical humming, steam whistles, sunset warmth.
[CAM] MCU, LOW ANGLE PUSH-IN -> [ACT] LEA pulls into a vertical hover, her hair and silks billowing upward; she reaches toward the camera with a look of pure exhilaration as her ribbons of light explode into a brilliant aurora -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Orchestral crescendo, thunderous rushing wind.
[</BRIEF>]

III. ROBERT

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a cinematic fantasy montage featuring @actor as ROBERT, a masterful time-traveling performer whose rhythmic movements trigger seamless match-on-action transitions through historical eras.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Prioritize the axis of rotation and physical momentum. Every cut must synchronize with the peak of a spin or the extension of a limb to ensure the "match" is visually perfect. Maintain a consistent center-of-gravity. Ensure the movement of the wardrobe (doublet, kilt, kimono, tuxedo) mimics the previous shot's physics to hide the transition point.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Medium: 35mm film, high dynamic range, lush period textures
Palette: Royal Crimson and Gold (Renaissance) -> Sandstone and Lapis (Egypt) -> Indigo and Moss (Japan) -> Monochrome and Chrome (1920s)
Lighting: Warm chandelier glow, harsh overhead desert sun, soft diffused garden light, high-contrast spotlighting
Wardrobe: Velvet doublet with gold embroidery -> Ornate Egyptian linen kilt and bronze pectoral -> Formal silk haori and hakama -> Sharp 1920s black tuxedo with coattails
Props: A heavy velvet cloak (initial shot) that transitions into the flow of the other outfits
Environment: Grand Hapsburg-style ballroom, an interior corridor of a Giza temple, a quiet Zen temple courtyard, a bustling New York speakeasy
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
[CAM] MS, CIRCULAR ORBIT -> ROBERT stands at the center of a candlelit Renaissance ballroom, draped in a heavy crimson velvet cloak; he initiates a powerful, controlled pirouette.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MS, ORBITING -> [ACT] ROBERT begins a clockwise spin, his heavy cloak billowing out to catch the air as he turns -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV/TRANS] Orchestral crescendo, rustle of heavy fabric.
[CAM] MS, MATCH-CUT (Mid-spin) -> [ACT] The rotation continues perfectly, but ROBERT is now in an Egyptian temple, wearing a linen kilt; his arms stay extended, maintaining the centrifugal force -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Rhythmic tribal percussion, echoing stone chamber, desert heat haze.
[CAM] MS, MATCH-CUT (Transitioning from spin to arm sweep) -> [ACT] He completes the turn and sweeps his right arm in a wide arc across a Japanese garden, now dressed in a formal indigo haori -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Shishiodoshi (bamboo water fountain) clack, falling leaves, soft flute.
[CAM] MCU, MATCH-CUT (Following the arm sweep) -> [ACT] As his hand clears the frame, ROBERT is in a 1920s speakeasy wearing a tuxedo, transitioning the sweep into a sharp, rhythmic jazz step -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Snappy snare drums, muffled trumpet, clinking glasses, thick haze.
[CAM] MS, TRACKING IN -> [ACT] ROBERT finishes the sequence with a sharp, controlled theatrical bow, his coattails settling as he looks up with a confident, breathless grin -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Burst of jazz brass, roaring crowd noise, shimmering ambient chime.
[CAM] CU -> [ACT] Close-up on his eyes reflecting a montage of shifting timelines as he exhales, the world behind him vibrating with temporal energy -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Low-frequency hum, visual chromatic aberration.
[</BRIEF>]

IV. JOHN

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a 10-second high-adrenaline fantasy flying montage featuring @actor as JOHN, a celestial voyager, utilizing seamless match-on-action cuts as he soars through multiple ethereal sky-worlds.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Prioritize motion vector continuity; ensure JOHN's flight trajectory (diving, banking, or accelerating) carries through every cut. Maintain central framing of the subject to anchor the viewer’s eye during rapid environment shifts. Use body orientation and limb placement as the primary match-cut triggers.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Medium: IMAX-format digital, high-speed shutter for crisp motion
Palette: Gradient shifts (Golden Hour -> Deep Galactic Violet -> Emerald Aurora -> Iridescent Prism)
Lighting: Backlit sun-glow, rhythmic lightning flashes, bioluminescent nebula haze
Wardrobe: Shifting aerodynamic gear (flowing silks, leather aviator rig, luminous weave flight-suit)
Environment: Cumulonimbus canyons, star-field rifts, frozen cloud-spires, floating liquid-sky islands
Sound: Rushing wind, low-frequency sonic booms, ethereal choir swells
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
[CAM] FS, POV-TRACKING BEHIND -> JOHN is mid-dive, arms tucked at his sides, plunging vertically through a floor of dense, golden-orange sunset clouds; his cape ripples violently in the slipstream.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] FS, REAR TRACKING -> [ACT] JOHN accelerates downward, breaking through a cloud layer into a realm of floating obsidian mountains -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Sonic boom, golden vapor trails.
[CAM] MS, MATCH CUT (Profile) -> [ACT] JOHN levels out his flight, banking hard to the left, his right hand grazing a stream of liquid starlight in a purple galactic void -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Shimmering bell tones, stardust wake.
[CAM] MCU, MATCH CUT (Frontal) -> [ACT] JOHN flies directly toward the lens, face filled with exhilaration, as he enters a sky filled with emerald aurora ribbons -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Static electricity crackle, green light reflecting on his skin.
[CAM] MS, MATCH CUT (Low Angle) -> [ACT] JOHN performs a barrel roll through a cluster of giant, floating translucent jellyfish-islands in a turquoise sky -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Deep underwater-style muffled thrum, bubbles in the air.
[CAM] EWS, MATCH CUT (Side profile) -> [ACT] JOHN becomes a streak of white light, hurtling toward a massive, shattered crystalline sun at the horizon -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] High-energy orchestral crescendo.
[CAM] POV -> [ACT] The sky fractures like glass, revealing a new infinite horizon as JOHN’s hands reach forward to grab the air, pulling the frame into a blinding prism flash -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Shivering glass SFX, sudden silence.
[</BRIEF>]

V. SARAH

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a 10-second cinematic fantasy montage featuring @actor as SARAH, a timeless virtuoso whose dance moves act as the catalyst for shifting through historical eras via seamless match-on-action.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Prioritize centered composition and kinetic continuity. Every cut must occur mid-rotation or mid-gesture to create a fluid, "impossible" dance. Maintain SARAH’s eye-level and center-of-gravity across all eras. Ensure wardrobe and environment transitions are instantaneous while the physical momentum remains unbroken.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Medium: 35mm film grain, rich saturation, period-accurate textures
Palette: Warm Gold (Renaissance) -> Sun-drenched Ochre (Egypt) -> Soft Pink/White (Japan) -> Smokey Monochrome/Amber (1920s)
Lighting: Candlelight flicker, harsh desert sun, dappled courtyard light, hazy club spotlight
Wardrobe: Shifting from a Baroque silk gown to Egyptian linen and gold, then a silk kimono, ending in a beaded flapper dress
Props: A silk fan or veil that persists through the first few transitions
Environment: Versailles-style ballroom, Giza temple interior, Meiji-era cherry blossom garden, a 1920s Paris jazz lounge
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
[CAM] MS, CIRCULAR ORBIT -> SARAH stands in the center of a candlelit Baroque ballroom, wearing a heavy embroidered gown, holding a sheer silk veil; she begins a slow, graceful pirouette.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MS, ORBITING -> [ACT] SARAH begins a clockwise spin, her gown billowing outward as she turns -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV/TRANS] Orchestral strings, flickering candlelight.
[CAM] MS, MATCH-CUT (Mid-spin) -> [ACT] The turn continues seamlessly, but SARAH is now in an Ancient Egyptian temple, wearing thin white linen and heavy gold neck-collars; the veil in her hand remains fluid -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Rhythmic hand drums, desert wind, dust motes dancing in sunbeams.
[CAM] MS, MATCH-CUT (Transitioning from spin to arm sweep) -> [ACT] SARAH completes the turn and sweeps her arms wide in a Meiji-era garden, now dressed in a floral silk kimono -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Sound of a Koto, falling cherry blossoms, soft afternoon light.
[CAM] MCU, MATCH-CUT (Following the hand sweep) -> [ACT] Her sweeping hand passes in front of the lens, and as it clears, she is in a 1920s Jazz club, wearing a silver-fringed flapper dress and a bob haircut, performing a high-energy rhythmic kick -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Upbeat brass jazz, thick cigar smoke, shimmering sequins.
[CAM] MS, TRACKING IN -> [ACT] SARAH finishes the dance with a dramatic, low theatrical bow, head tilted up with a breathless, triumphant smile -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Roaring applause, muffled jazz piano, a final swell of cinematic strings.
[CAM] CU -> [ACT] Close-up on her face as she winks, the background blurring into a kaleidoscope of all previous eras simultaneously -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Harmonic resonance, shimmering visual trails.
[</BRIEF>]

VI. EVAN

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a 10-second cinematic underwater montage featuring @actor as EVAN, a joyful deep-sea explorer, using seamless match-on-action transitions to capture a sense of weightless wonder and aquatic adrenaline.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Prioritize center-frame alignment to facilitate match-cuts during swimming strokes. Maintain fluid, buoyant movement across all transitions. Ensure consistent bubble physics and light caustic patterns to ground the fantasy physics. Track the position of EVAN’s arms to ensure match-on-action continuity between different underwater biomes.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Medium: High-speed underwater cinematography, 8K resolution, vivid clarity
Palette: Aquamarine gradients, bioluminescent neon pinks, emerald greens, sun-drenched gold
Lighting: Shimmering water caustics, dancing "god-rays" from the surface, soft organic glows
Wardrobe: Sleek, iridescent explorer suit with glowing fiber-optic trim (no mask to prioritize facial performance)
Props: A handheld sonic-mapping orb that pulses with soft white light
Environment: Tropical coral gardens, ancient sunken marble arches, glowing jellyfish abyss, kelp cathedrals
Sound: Muffled oceanic thumps, melodic bubble pops, ethereal choir swells, rushing water flow
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
[CAM] MS, TRACKING FORWARD -> EVAN is suspended in crystal-clear turquoise water, arms spread wide in a "flight" posture, gliding over a vibrant coral reef; his face is lit with a wide, ecstatic grin as tiny bubbles trail from his shoulders.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MS, CENTER-TRACKING -> [ACT] EVAN glides forward, performing a powerful breaststroke kick that propels him through a cloud of yellow tang fish -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Rushing water, shimmering sun-rays.
[CAM] MS, MATCH CUT (Same momentum) -> [ACT] EVAN’s stroke continues seamlessly as the environment shifts to a majestic sunken marble hall; he glides through a massive archway -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Low-frequency choral hum, ancient debris floating.
[CAM] MCU, MATCH-ON-ACTION -> [ACT] EVAN reaches out with his right hand toward the camera, eyes gleaming with excitement; the background shifts to a dark abyss filled with pulsing, neon-violet jellyfish -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Electrical hum, soft bioluminescent flashes.
[CAM] FS, ORBITING -> [ACT] EVAN performs a joyful barrel roll, his body centered as the world rotates into a dense, golden kelp forest -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Swishing plants, muffled thuds of sea life.
[CAM] MCU, PULL BACK -> [ACT] EVAN swims upward toward the shimmering silver surface, his hand reaching for the light as a massive school of barracuda spirals around him in a perfect vortex -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] High-energy orchestral peak, bubbling crescendo.
[CAM] CU -> [ACT] EVAN breaks into a final, triumphant laugh under the water, the sonic orb in his hand flashing a brilliant, blinding white light that consumes the frame -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Shimmering resonance, crystalline chime.
[</BRIEF>]

VII. ROSA

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a 10-second high-energy fantasy montage featuring @actor as ROSA, a street dancer who reality-warps through breakdance, transitioning from a mundane urban setting into breathtaking magical realms using seamless match-on-action.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Prioritize kinetic continuity by matching the centrifugal force and limb trajectory of breakdance "power moves" (flares, windmills, and freezes) across environment cuts. Ensure the camera follows the dancer’s center of gravity. Maintain the glow of her sneakers as a persistent visual anchor through all transformations.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Medium: 35mm film, high frame rate for crisp motion, dynamic shutter angle
Palette: Desaturated Concrete Grey -> Iridescent Opal -> Deep Bioluminescent Purple -> Solar Gold
Lighting: Harsh urban streetlights transitioning into ethereal, multi-directional magical glows
Wardrobe: Evolution from oversized grey streetwear to shimmering, liquid-metal fabric that flows with her movement
Props: Glowing pulse-point sensors on wrists and shoes
Environment: Gritty alleyway, floating marble ruins, giant mushroom forest, celestial star-forge
Sound: Heavy breakbeat syncopated with magical chime-hits on every world-shift
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
[CAM] WS, LOW ANGLE, STATIC -> ROSA is center-frame in a dim, rain-slicked city alleyway; she drops into a low "crouch" position, hands hitting the wet pavement as a ripple of light emanates from her palms.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MS, CIRCULAR ORBIT -> [ACT] ROSA kicks into a "Flare" power move, her legs sweeping in a wide arc -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Water splashes turn into floating gold dust as the alleyway dissolves into a sky-high marble temple.
[CAM] MS, MATCH CUT (Matching leg rotation) -> [ACT] ROSA continues the Flare move seamlessly, now spinning atop a floating pillar amidst a sea of clouds -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Rushing wind, choir-synth swell.
[CAM] MCU, TILT WITH MOTION -> [ACT] She transitions into a "Windmill" back-spin; her clothes shimmer and transform into glowing silk as she rotates -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Environment shifts to a bioluminescent jungle; giant ferns blur into streaks of purple light.
[CAM] LOW ANGLE, PUSH IN -> [ACT] ROSA snaps from the spin into a vertical "Hand-Hole" freeze, balancing on one hand; her body is perfectly still while the world around her warps -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Sudden silence, heavy bass thud, reality ripples like water.
[CAM] WS, MATCH CUT (Static position) -> [ACT] Still in the freeze, ROSA is now atop a sun-drenched peak in a celestial star-forge; she suddenly drops her legs and stands tall -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Distant cosmic roar, solar flares.
[CAM] CU -> [ACT] ROSA looks into the lens, a spark of pure white magic igniting in her pupils as she exhales a cloud of stardust -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Final resonant chime, shimmering air distortion.
[</BRIEF>]

VIII. MARK

[[STAGING]]
[[INTENT]]
Create a 10-second cinematic fantasy montage featuring @actor as MARK, an interdimensional wayfarer, using rapid match-on-action cuts to showcase a high-adrenaline journey through diverse realms.
[[/INTENT]]
[[LOGIC]]
Prioritize center-frame composition and match-on-action to ensure seamless transitions during the rapid montage. Maintain the momentum of MARK's forward movement (sprinting/leaping) across all environments. Preserve the glowing artifact's position in his right hand as a visual anchor. Ensure high-speed camera tracking to enhance the sense of adrenaline and wonder.
[[/LOGIC]]
[[AESTHETIC]]
Medium: 65mm Anamorphic, high texture, sharp focus
Palette: High-contrast transitions (Neon Blue -> Amber Gold -> Arctic Turquoise -> Volcanic Red)
Lighting: Volumetric god-rays, dramatic rim lighting, environment-specific glow
Wardrobe: Shifting adventure gear (tech-explorer, steampunk leather, heavy furs, obsidian armor)
Props: A pulsing crystalline compass held firmly in the right hand
Location: Bioluminescent forest, floating brass city, ice desert, volcanic void
Sound: Rhythmic orchestral percussion, elemental swooshes, high-energy synth pulses
[[/AESTHETIC]]
[[OPENING]]
[CAM] MS, LOW ANGLE, TRACKING BACKWARD -> MARK is centered in frame, sprinting through a bioluminescent forest of neon-blue vines, clutching a glowing crystal compass in his right hand, face etched with intense wonder.
[[/OPENING]]
[[/STAGING]]

[<BRIEF>]
[CAM] MS, CENTER-TRACKING -> [ACT] MARK sprints through the neon forest, leaping over a glowing root -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Shimmering pollen, deep bass hum.
[CAM] MS, MATCH CUT (Same tracking speed/position) -> [ACT] MARK’s stride continues perfectly into a steampunk citadel, running across a brass catwalk -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Hissing steam, golden sunset light, grinding gears.
[CAM] MCU, MATCH CUT -> [ACT] Close-up on MARK's face, eyes wide and breathless, frost forming on his stubble as he runs through a crystalline blizzard -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Howling wind, turquoise lens flares.
[CAM] MS, LOW ANGLE -> [ACT] MARK leaps forward across a glacial chasm, right hand extended with the glowing compass -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Cracking ice, prismatic light burst.
[CAM] FS, MATCH CUT (Mid-air leap) -> [ACT] MARK lands a heavy, braced crouch on a floating obsidian rock amidst a volcanic void, right hand still holding the artifact high -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] Erupting magma, flying embers, thunderous orchestral hit.
[CAM] CU, PUSH IN -> [ACT] MARK looks directly into the camera, jaw tight, sweat and soot on his face, as the compass in his hand emits a blinding white flash -> [AUDIO/VFX/ENV] High-pitched crystalline ring, screen fills with pure white light.
[</BRIEF>]

cues.selectedText: MCU
Mark looks down at the sphere and tosses it upward; as the ball leaves his hand, the rain freezes in mid-air

cues.speaker: MARK
cues.selectedText: Every new world needs a wanderer.
MS, match-cut on sphere trajectory
Environment snaps to a vast, windy desert at golden hour; Mark is now in desert robes

cues.speaker: MARK
cues.selectedText: A thousand horizons.
MCU, match-cut on sphere descent
The sphere falls into his right hand; he catches it with a slight recoil of the wrist

cues.speaker: MARK
cues.selectedText: A million lives.
CU, low-angle looking up
He holds the sphere close to the lens; the orb’s surface begins to glow with an intense, blinding white light

cues.speaker: MARK
cues.selectedText: Let me introduce you ... to the faces of our multiverse.
FS, center-framed
Mark stands perfectly still as the sphere in his hand erupts into a localized supernova, consuming his silhouette and the entire frame
Fade to White
MS, SPIRAL ORBIT
LEA performs a tight aerial spin, drawing a circle in the air with her glowing finger-ribbons
MS, MATCH-CUT (Continuing the spin)
The rotation continues perfectly, but the background shifts to a lush floating jungle; LEA’s silks turn teal to match the vibrant vines she glides past
MCU, MATCH-CUT (Transition into a forward dive)
LEA archs her back and dives head-first through a layer of thick mist
FS, MATCH-CUT (Exiting the dive)
She emerges from the mist into a cosmic void filled with purple nebulae, transitioning her dive into a graceful, swimming breaststroke through the stars
MS, MATCH-CUT (Momentum shift)
She kicks off an invisible surface and propels herself upward into a steampunk sky-city; her wardrobe shifts to copper-trimmed leather as she soars between giant spinning brass propellers
MCU, LOW ANGLE PUSH-IN
LEA pulls into a vertical hover, her hair and silks billowing upward; she reaches toward the camera with a look of pure exhilaration as her ribbons of light explode into a brilliant aurora
MS, ORBITING
ROBERT begins a clockwise spin, his heavy cloak billowing out to catch the air as he turns
MS, MATCH-CUT (Mid-spin)
The rotation continues perfectly, but ROBERT is now in an Egyptian temple, wearing a linen kilt; his arms stay extended, maintaining the centrifugal force
MS, MATCH-CUT (Transitioning from spin to arm sweep)
He completes the turn and sweeps his right arm in a wide arc across a Japanese garden, now dressed in a formal indigo haori
MCU, MATCH-CUT (Following the arm sweep)
As his hand clears the frame, ROBERT is in a 1920s speakeasy wearing a tuxedo, transitioning the sweep into a sharp, rhythmic jazz step
MS, TRACKING IN
ROBERT finishes the sequence with a sharp, controlled theatrical bow, his coattails settling as he looks up with a confident, breathless grin
CU
Close-up on his eyes reflecting a montage of shifting timelines as he exhales, the world behind him vibrating with temporal energy
FS, REAR TRACKING
JOHN accelerates downward, breaking through a cloud layer into a realm of floating obsidian mountains
MS, MATCH CUT (Profile)
JOHN levels out his flight, banking hard to the left, his right hand grazing a stream of liquid starlight in a purple galactic void
MCU, MATCH CUT (Frontal)
JOHN flies directly toward the lens, face filled with exhilaration, as he enters a sky filled with emerald aurora ribbons
MS, MATCH CUT (Low Angle)
JOHN performs a barrel roll through a cluster of giant, floating translucent jellyfish-islands in a turquoise sky
EWS, MATCH CUT (Side profile)
JOHN becomes a streak of white light, hurtling toward a massive, shattered crystalline sun at the horizon
POV
The sky fractures like glass, revealing a new infinite horizon as JOHN’s hands reach forward to grab the air, pulling the frame into a blinding prism flash
MS, ORBITING
SARAH begins a clockwise spin, her gown billowing outward as she turns
MS, MATCH-CUT (Mid-spin)
The turn continues seamlessly, but SARAH is now in an Ancient Egyptian temple, wearing thin white linen and heavy gold neck-collars; the veil in her hand remains fluid
MS, MATCH-CUT (Transitioning from spin to arm sweep)
SARAH completes the turn and sweeps her arms wide in a Meiji-era garden, now dressed in a floral silk kimono
MCU, MATCH-CUT (Following the hand sweep)
Her sweeping hand passes in front of the lens, and as it clears, she is in a 1920s Jazz club, wearing a silver-fringed flapper dress and a bob haircut, performing a high-energy rhythmic kick
MS, TRACKING IN
SARAH finishes the dance with a dramatic, low theatrical bow, head tilted up with a breathless, triumphant smile
CU
Close-up on her face as she winks, the background blurring into a kaleidoscope of all previous eras simultaneously
MS, CENTER-TRACKING
EVAN glides forward, performing a powerful breaststroke kick that propels him through a cloud of yellow tang fish
MS, MATCH CUT (Same momentum)
EVAN’s stroke continues seamlessly as the environment shifts to a majestic sunken marble hall; he glides through a massive archway
MCU, MATCH-ON-ACTION
EVAN reaches out with his right hand toward the camera, eyes gleaming with excitement; the background shifts to a dark abyss filled with pulsing, neon-violet jellyfish
FS, ORBITING
EVAN performs a joyful barrel roll, his body centered as the world rotates into a dense, golden kelp forest
MCU, PULL BACK
EVAN swims upward toward the shimmering silver surface, his hand reaching for the light as a massive school of barracuda spirals around him in a perfect vortex
CU
EVAN breaks into a final, triumphant laugh under the water, the sonic orb in his hand flashing a brilliant, blinding white light that consumes the frame
MS, CIRCULAR ORBIT
ROSA kicks into a "Flare" power move, her legs sweeping in a wide arc
MS, MATCH CUT (Matching leg rotation)
ROSA continues the Flare move seamlessly, now spinning atop a floating pillar amidst a sea of clouds
MCU, TILT WITH MOTION
She transitions into a "Windmill" back-spin; her clothes shimmer and transform into glowing silk as she rotates
LOW ANGLE, PUSH IN
ROSA snaps from the spin into a vertical "Hand-Hole" freeze, balancing on one hand; her body is perfectly still while the world around her warps
WS, MATCH CUT (Static position)
Still in the freeze, ROSA is now atop a sun-drenched peak in a celestial star-forge; she suddenly drops her legs and stands tall
CU
ROSA looks into the lens, a spark of pure white magic igniting in her pupils as she exhales a cloud of stardust
MS, CENTER-TRACKING
MARK sprints through the neon forest, leaping over a glowing root
MS, MATCH CUT (Same tracking speed/position)
MARK’s stride continues perfectly into a steampunk citadel, running across a brass catwalk
MCU, MATCH CUT
Close-up on MARK's face, eyes wide and breathless, frost forming on his stubble as he runs through a crystalline blizzard
MS, LOW ANGLE
MARK leaps forward across a glacial chasm, right hand extended with the glowing compass
FS, MATCH CUT (Mid-air leap)
MARK lands a heavy, braced crouch on a floating obsidian rock amidst a volcanic void, right hand still holding the artifact high
CU, PUSH IN
MARK looks directly into the camera, jaw tight, sweat and soot on his face, as the compass in his hand emits a blinding white flash
